case_title: O'GRADY PLUMBING VS. HERITAGE COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'GRADY PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT HERITAGE COMPANY
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED TO THE DEFENDANT HERITAGE COMPANY BY CERTIFIED MSIL IS RETURNED=RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'GRADY PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, VIVIAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED NOV-13-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KAUFMAN, VIVIAN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $463.25 FILED BY O'GRADY PLUMBING AS TO DEFENDANT HERITAGE COMPANY KAUFMAN, VIVIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-12-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT HERITAGE COMPANY. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (D-506)
